category_sources: source_facts.description says Bayesian haplotype-based genetic polymorphism discovery and genotyping; official GitHub README calls freebayes a haplotype-based variant detector.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is freebayes; official GitHub repository and README use freebayes.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains the user manual and guide, overview, installation, usage, filters, and development sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/freebayes/freebayes, so repo enrichment was intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe genetic variant detection, SNPs/indels/MNPs, VCF output, and command-line usage.
